contextBlurb: Yukon's housing legislation landscape is anchored by the new Residential Tenancies Act (Bill No. 46), which received assent and came into effect on September 1, 2025, replacing the former Residential Landlord and Tenant Act. The 2025 spring sitting of the Yukon Legislative Assembly included $57.6 million in new and ongoing housing projects and $24.4 million for residential lot development. The Yukon Housing Corporation continues to operate under statutory reporting requirements and publishes annual reports to the Legislative Assembly.

legislation.title: 2025-26 Supplementary Estimates No. 1
legislation.summary: Supplementary budget estimates for the 2025-26 fiscal year prepared by the Department of Finance, tabled in the 1st Session of the 36th Legislature in December 2025.

legislation.title: 2025–26 Supplementary Estimates No. 1
legislation.summary: Prepared by the Department of Finance under Management Board direction; presented to the 1st Session of the 36th Legislature in December 2025 to adjust appropriations including housing-related spending.

legislation.title: Residential Tenancies Act
legislation.summary: Replaces the former Residential Landlord and Tenant Act, strengthening rental protections for landlords and tenants. Came into effect September 1, 2025.

legislation.title: Minimum Health, Safety and Housing Standards – Residential Tenancies Act 2025
legislation.summary: Establishes minimum health, safety, and housing standards for residential tenancies in Yukon, coming into effect September 1, 2025 under the new Residential Tenancies Act.

legislation.title: Minimum Health, Safety and Housing Standards (Residential Tenancies Act 2025)
legislation.summary: Establishes minimum health, safety, and housing standards applicable under the new Residential Tenancies Act, coming into effect September 1, 2025.

legislation.title: Shared Accommodations Policy – Residential Tenancies Act 2025
legislation.summary: Provides rules and fact sheets governing shared accommodations, subletting, and roommate arrangements under the Residential Tenancies Act 2025.

legislation.title: Shared Accommodations – Residential Tenancies Act 2025
legislation.summary: Sets out rules for shared accommodations, subletting, and roommates under the Residential Tenancies Act, with fact sheets issued for both tenants and landlords.

legislation.billCode: Safe and Supportive Housing Program (5131 5th Ave)
legislation.title: Safe and Supportive Housing Program at 5131 5th Avenue
legislation.summary: A government-funded supportive housing program launched July 1, 2025 in partnership with Safe at Home Society at 5131 5th Avenue in Whitehorse, expanding on an existing 17-unit program at 408 Alexander Street that began December 1, 2024.

legislation.title: First Appropriation Act 2025-26
legislation.summary: Authorizes payment of up to $2,355,332,000 from the consolidated revenue fund to defray government charges, including housing-related expenditures for the 2025-26 fiscal year.

legislation.title: Second Appropriation Act 2025-26
legislation.summary: Authorizes an additional sum of up to $183,417,000 from the Yukon Treasury for the 2025-26 fiscal year as supplementary appropriations.
